## Linked issue
<!-- Example: Fixes #123 -->

## Bug
<!-- What is broken and how can it be observed? -->

## Root cause
<!-- Why did it happen? -->

## Fix
<!-- What changed to fix the issue? -->
- 
- 

## Validation
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:types` (if the fix changed TypeScript types or runtime contracts)

## Regression and docs
- [ ] I added/updated tests to cover the bug path
- [ ] I updated documentation/examples when user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No documentation update is needed
